Let's plan your safari

Tell us your dates and what you're hoping for. Our reservations team replies within a few hours, and can arrange charters, transfers and bespoke itineraries.

The reserve
Greater Kruger, Limpopo · 45 min charter from Johannesburg
Arrivals
Charters land at our airstrip · road transfers from Hoedspruit (90 min)
Good to know

Frequently asked

How do I get to the reserve?
Most guests fly into Hoedspruit or charter straight to our private airstrip, a 15-minute transfer from camp. We coordinate every flight and transfer once your dates are confirmed.
What's included in the rate?
Everything bar your flights and gratuities: all meals and bush dining, selected wines and bar, twice-daily game drives, guided walks and laundry. The rate you see is the rate you pay — no booking fees, ever.
Are children welcome?
Children 12 and over are welcome in most suites, and the Family Villa is built for younger travellers with its own guide, vehicle and childminding on request.
When is the best time to visit?
Game viewing is exceptional year-round. The dry winter months (May–September) concentrate wildlife around water; the green season brings dramatic skies, newborn animals and the best birding.
What is your cancellation policy?
A 30% deposit secures your booking, with the balance due 45 days before arrival. Cancellations more than 45 days out are fully refundable less the deposit. We're happy to talk through the detail.
SSabela

An intimate, design-led safari lodge on a private Big Five reserve in the Greater Kruger.
